task_graph: {"nodes": [{"id": "Node1", "description": "自动检测系统文档目录"}, {"id": "Node2", "description": "递归扫描指定目录及其子目录，查找所有MP3文件"}, {"id": "Node3", "description": "加载每个MP3文件并解析其音频数据"}, {"id": "Node4", "description": "计算音频的平均音量(dBFS)"}, {"id": "Node5", "description": "计算音频的最大瞬时音量(dBFS)"}, {"id": "Node6", "description": "计算音频的持续时间"}, {"id": "Node7", "description": "根据音量阈值判断音频质量状态"}, {"id": "Node8", "description": "输出分析结果或错误信息"}, {"id": "Node9", "description": "安装Whisper依赖库"}, {"id": "Node10", "description": "加载Whisper模型"}, {"id": "Node11", "description": "将MP3文件转换为WAV格式"}, {"id": "Node12", "description": "使用Whisper进行语音识别"}, {"id": "Node13", "description": "遍历目录中的所有MP3文件"}, {"id": "Node14", "description": "调用Google语音识别API"}, {"id": "Node15", "description": "设置GoogleAPI的语言参数为zh-CN"}, {"id": "Node16", "description": "将转录结果保存为TXT文件"}, {"id": "Node17", "description": "清理临时生成的WAV文件"}], "links": [{"source": "Node1", "target": "Node2", "type": "scanDirectory"}, {"source": "Node2", "target": "Node3", "type": "loadFiles"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node4", "type": "analyzeAudio"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node5", "type": "analyzeAudio"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node6", "type": "analyzeAudio"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node7", "type": "evaluateVolume"}, {"source": "Node5", "target": "Node7", "type": "evaluateVolume"}, {"source": "Node7", "target": "Node8", "type": "outputResult"}, {"source": "Node9", "target": "Node10", "type": "loadModel"}, {"source": "Node10", "target": "Node12", "type": "initializeRecognition"}, {"source": "Node11", "target": "Node12", "type": "convertFormat"}, {"source": "Node12", "target": "Node16", "type": "saveTranscription"}, {"source": "Node13", "target": "Node11", "type": "processFiles"}, {"source": "Node14", "target": "Node16", "type": "saveTranscription"}, {"source": "Node15", "target": "Node14", "type": "setLanguage"}, {"source": "Node16", "target": "Node17", "type": "cleanupTemporaryFiles"}]}
